example: SoftBank and Sony formed a joint venture to build a domestic 基盤モデル for Japanese-language and physical-AI applications.
METI designated advanced 半導体 fabrication equipment as a strategic national asset subject to export controls.
Rapidus plans to begin 量産 of 2-nanometer chips at its Chitose plant by 2027.
The 日本銀行 held its short-term policy rate at 0.75% in a divided 6–3 vote at the April meeting.
The BOJ revised its 物価 outlook sharply upward to 2.8% for fiscal year 2026, citing higher crude oil costs.

en: METI — Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry
example: The 経済産業省 is overseeing a ¥1 trillion domestic AI fund running from FY2026 through FY2031.

en: physical AI — AI for robotics and physical automation
example: The Japan AI Alliance will prioritize フィジカルAI for factory automation and next-generation humanoid robotics.

en: secondment; temporary staff loan between companies
example: Preferred Networks is contributing engineers to the Japan AI Alliance venture through a 出向 arrangement.

en: golden share — special share granting veto rights
example: The Japanese government holds a 黄金株 in Rapidus, giving it veto power over major strategic decisions.

en: stagflation — high inflation with low growth
example: Rising import costs and slowing GDP growth have raised the risk of スタグフレーション in the Japanese economy.
The BOJ's cautious 金融政策 stance kept rates on hold despite three dissenting board members voting for an immediate hike.
ラピダス confirmed its IIM-1 pilot line in Chitose is producing active 2nm gate-all-around test wafers co-developed with IBM.

ja: プリファードネットワークス
en: Tokyo AI startup; PLaMo LLM, robotics software
example: プリファードネットワークス is developing its PLaMo large language model alongside robotics control software for industrial clients.

en: enterprise AI — AI products deployed inside corporations and institutions
example: NEC's partnership with Anthropic targets Japan's 企業AI sector, beginning with finance, manufacturing, and local government.
Tokyo is preparing an additional 補助金 package to support TSMC's technology upgrade to 3nm at the Kumamoto JASM-2 plant.

en: FX intervention — government purchase/sale of currency to influence exchange rates
example: The 財務省 spent roughly ¥10 trillion on 為替介入 in late April and early May 2026 as the yen weakened past ¥160 per dollar.
Japan's April 消費者物価指数 came in at 1.4% core, the lowest reading since March 2022, complicating the BOJ's rate hike timeline.

en: Kumamoto Prefecture, Kyushu — home to TSMC JASM fabs
example: TSMC's JASM-2 fab under construction in 熊本県 has been upgraded from a 6–12nm plan to a leading-edge 3-nanometer process.

en: Center of Excellence (CoE) — internal unit for building specialized organizational capability
example: NEC will establish a 卓越センター to develop AI-native engineers, using technical training provided by Anthropic.

en: Ministry of Finance — oversees Japan's fiscal policy and authorizes FX intervention
example: The 財務省 authorized FX intervention operations in late April 2026 after the yen weakened past the politically sensitive ¥160 level.
SoftBank and NEC's joint venture focuses on 物理AI — models that control robots and factory machinery rather than generating text.
METI's 国産化 strategy targets processing all physical AI training data on domestic infrastructure without routing through foreign cloud platforms.
The 春闘 this year produced average wage increases exceeding 5% — a key input into the BOJ's inflation assessment.
The BOJ held its 政策金利 at 0.75% in April, with the OECD projecting a rise to 2.0% by end-2027.
A BOJ rate hike toward 2% would materially reduce the attractiveness of the 円キャリー取引 that has funded global risk-asset positioning.
